name: MicroShred, LLC
name_evidence: High-confidence unmasking. The [BizBuySell listing](https://www.bizbuysell.com/business-opportunity/secure-shredding-and-document-storage/2485929/) and [BizQuest mirror](https://www.bizquest.com/business-for-sale/secure-shredding-and-document-storage/BW2485929/) describe a Davie secure-shredding and document-storage company established in 2003, with recurring clients, locked shredding consoles, specialized shredding trucks, a 1,700 sq ft leased warehouse, $4,180 monthly rent, and the contact phone 305-999-9234. [MicroShred](https://microshred.com/) uses the same phone number, says it is locally owned and operated since 2003, serves Miami-Dade/Broward/Palm Beach, and offers the same recurring shredding, hard-drive/media/product destruction, and document-storage services. The [BBB profile](https://www.bbb.org/us/fl/davie/profile/document-shredding/microshred-llc-0633-26002577) ties MicroShred to 10384 W State Road 84 Ste 3, Davie, lists BBB accreditation since 2004, and names Orly Ciechanowicki as an officer/customer contact; Orly Ciechanowiecki is also the person listed on the sale listing. Verify with seller/NDA, but the public trail is unusually direct.
reason_for_selling: Owners preparing for retirement after more than 20 years
ai_opportunity: Route-density optimization, recurring-service scheduling, CRM/quote automation, barcode inventory and box-retrieval workflows for document storage, scan-on-demand workflow automation, digital certificate-of-destruction generation, customer portal, retention/churn analytics, and truck-utilization dashboards.
notes: High-confidence match to MicroShred, LLC. Public listing economics: $1.45M asking price, $651K gross revenue, no SDE/EBITDA disclosed, and $453K FF&E included. Asking price is 2.23x revenue before knowing SDE, so normalized owner earnings are the make-or-break diligence item. Assets include specialized shredding trucks, a box truck, baler, forklift, industrial pallet racking, office equipment, and many locked shredding consoles placed at client locations. Facility is a 1,700 sq ft leased Davie warehouse used for truck parking, equipment storage, and document-storage operations; rent is $4,180/mo and lease expires 02/28/2027. Services confirmed from MicroShred pages include recurring route shredding with lockable bins, one-time/bulk purge shredding, drop-off shredding by appointment, hard-drive/media/product destruction, and secure document storage with barcode tracking, scan-on-demand, same-day retrieval, and optional destruction. BBB shows A+ accreditation and names Rosemary Tsohn as president and Orly Ciechanowicki as officer/customer contact; Florida business-profile mirrors list active LLC status and managers Rosemary Tsohn, Ami Hai Tsohn, and Orly Ciechanowiecki. Public job listings show recent hiring for driver/warehouse helper labor at $14-$14.50/hr, with route work, box-truck duties, background checks, drug screening, and 45 lb lifting. Key diligence: get tax returns and monthly P&L, customer/route revenue by cohort, customer concentration, recurring contract terms, churn, console count/deployment list, truck titles/maintenance/accidents, recycling/bale vendor economics, document-storage box count/MRR/liability, proof of insurance/bonding, i-SIGMA/NAID status, lease assignment/options, seller noncompete/training, and explanation of the old MicroShred Inc./Cornerstone acquisition trail. Detailed memo: [research/secure-shredding-document-storage-davie-2026-04-29.md](research/secure-shredding-document-storage-davie-2026-04-29.md).
